title: tragacantha vestita
intro: Tragacantha vestita, also known as the hairy burr or gorse, is a spiny shrub that belongs to the Fabaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Tragacantha vestita include reducing fever, alleviating digestive problems, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, ointments, and salves for topical application.
